text:
LONG NAME: NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
163W00000X: Registered nurse 
163WA0400X: Registered nurse — addiction (substance use disorder) 
163WA2000X: Registered nurse — administrator 
163WC0200X: Registered nurse — critical care medicine 
163WC0400X: Registered nurse — case
